message:
chore(beads): track scan loop optimization follow-up (frankenjax-30sd)

Adds frankenjax-30sd (in_progress) as a follow-up bead to the scan
parity slice in frankenjax-u0y4 (committed earlier this push). Tracks
the perf slice for the interpreter functional scan eval loop:

- Remove per-iteration Vec allocation in the body argument prep path.
- Replace the dynamic Box<dyn Iterator<...>> reverse-scan dispatch
  with a static branch.
- Preserve carry/ys/reverse semantics established by the new
  scan tests in fj-interpreters/src/lib.rs.

Tracker entry only — no code changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
